name: Paragliding over Interlaken
description: Tandem paragliding flight over the stunning Interlaken valley between two alpine lakes.
longDescription: Experience the thrill of tandem paragliding over one of Switzerland's most beautiful valleys. Launch from Beatenberg or Amisbühl and soar above Interlaken with views of Lake Thun, Lake Brienz, and the Jungfrau massif. No experience needed — professional pilots handle everything. Flights last 15-20 minutes with optional acrobatic maneuvers.

providers.name: Paragliding Interlaken
providers.description: Most experienced operator — 20+ years, GoPro video included

providers.name: AlpinAir Paragliding
providers.description: Smaller groups, flexible schedule, free photos

providers.name: Skywings Paragliding
providers.description: Acrobatic flights available, sunset flights in summer
